calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To Jul-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Attorney for Plaintiff Edward David Clements appeared in court.
Defendant Janet Torres not appearing.

Counsel is requesting to serve notice of labor appeal to the Defendnat via publication and mailing. The court informs him that this must be done an order from department 206.

This matter is continued to April 8, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow counsel time to have his hearing re: publication in department 206 and to publish it.

Counsel was informed that if publication is granted and completed, he will need to provide this department with courtesy copies and a proposed judgment prior to this hearing.

Counsel requested an order stateing this matter is continued. He may prepare one and submit it to this department for review and processing.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Continued To Dec-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Legion Corporation appearing represented by Edward David Clements, Esq. appeared in court.
Defendant Janet Torres not appearing.

This matter is continued to allow Mr. Clements an oppertunity to serve defendant Janet Torres with the notice of labor appeal.

Mr. Clements stated they are persuing an order of publication as alternative service.

This matter is continued to December 10, 2025 at 9:00am. in dept. 505 to provide time for Mr. Clements to prepare and submit his request for an order for publication.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 08:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Janet Torres.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505

Plaintiff Legion Corporation did not appeare.
Counsel for Plaintiff Edward David Clements appeared in court.
Defendant Janet Torres not appearing.

Mr. Clements stated they have not been able to serve defendant Janet Torres with the notice of labor appeal.

Mr. Clements stated they are persuing an order of publication as alternative service.

This matter is continued to September 17, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to provide time for Mr. Clements to prepare and submit his request for an order for publication.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-02-2025 Continued To Jul-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Continued To May-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Janet Torres.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:40 am and concluding at 10:58 am.

Appellant Legion Corporation is represented by Edward Clements, Esq.
Respondent Janet Torres not appearing.
Nephtali Gonzalez, Esq appearing as named counsel.

The Court finds that Nephtali Gonzalez, Esq is not the counsel of record for the respondent. The Court further finds that Respondent Janet Torres was not served with the notice of labor appeal.

The Court continues the matter to allow the Appellant to serve the notice upon the respondent, The matter is continued to May 02, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept 505.
